questions.question:
A Deployment named `dns-client` in namespace `dnspolicy-lab` is not starting with the intended pod-level DNS settings.

Fix the workload so that:
- `dnsPolicy` is `None`
- `dnsConfig.nameservers[0]` is `1.1.1.1`
- `dnsConfig.searches[0]` is `lab.local`
- `dnsConfig.options[0]` uses name `ndots` with value `2`
- the Deployment becomes Available
- the running Pod shows the corrected resolver settings in `/etc/resolv.conf`

Do not modify cluster DNS services such as CoreDNS. Fix the workload DNS configuration only.

verification.description: Deployment dns-client uses the intended dnsPolicy and dnsConfig values
Deployment dns-client becomes Available after the DNS settings are repaired
The running Pod resolver file contains the expected nameserver, search, and ndots settings
